testcase.name: User Registration & Login › registers a new user and receives a session ID
User Registration & Login › returns points = 0 for a brand-new user
User Registration & Login › newly registered user can access protected /api/userinfo/points
User Registration & Login › session is rejected after logout
User Registration & Login › user can log in again after logout
User Registration & Login › rejects registration with an already-used phone number
User Registration & Login › rejects login with wrong password
User Registration & Login › protected endpoint returns 4xx without X-Session-Id header
Receipt Submission & Points Accrual › submitting a receipt credits points to the user
Receipt Submission & Points Accrual › user can list their own receipts
Receipt Submission & Points Accrual › user can read their own receipt details
Receipt Submission & Points Accrual › rejects duplicate receipt ID
Receipt Submission & Points Accrual › user B cannot access user A receipt details
Receipt Submission & Points Accrual › multiple receipts accumulate points cumulatively
Coupon Discovery & Redemption › authenticated user can list available coupons
Coupon Discovery & Redemption › listing coupons without session returns 4xx
Coupon Discovery & Redemption › user coupon wallet is accessible
Coupon Discovery & Redemption › can read individual coupon details when coupon exists
Coupon Discovery & Redemption › user can redeem an available coupon and receives a serial number

property.name: skip
property.value: No free coupons available — skipping redemption test

testcase.name: Coupon Discovery & Redemption › merchant can validate (redeem-by-serial) a user coupon serial

property.name: skip
property.value: No free coupons available — skipping serial redemption test

testcase.name: Coupon Discovery & Redemption › a serial number cannot be consumed twice

property.name: skip
property.value: No free coupons — skipping double-redeem test

testcase.name: Manager Workflow — Offer Lifecycle › manager quick-login returns a manager-role session
Manager Workflow — Offer Lifecycle › manager can create an offer and it appears in managed list
Manager Workflow — Offer Lifecycle › offer created by manager is visible to regular users
Manager Workflow — Offer Lifecycle › manager can deactivate and re-activate an offer
Manager Workflow — Offer Lifecycle › manager can update offer title and description
Manager Workflow — Offer Lifecycle › manager can delete an offer and it disappears from lists
Manager Workflow — Offer Lifecycle › regular user is forbidden from creating an offer
Store Discovery › listing stores without session returns 4xx
Store Discovery › authenticated user can list stores
Store Discovery › each store in the list has id, name, and mallId
Store Discovery › user can get store details and data is consistent with list
Store Discovery › requesting a non-existent store ID returns 404
Store Discovery › returned stores all belong to the same mall context
Store Discovery › calling the store list twice returns the same result
Announcement Lifecycle › listing announcements without session returns 4xx
Announcement Lifecycle › authenticated user can list announcements
Announcement Lifecycle › manager can create an announcement
Announcement Lifecycle › announcement created by manager is visible in public list
Announcement Lifecycle › manager can pin and unpin an announcement
Announcement Lifecycle › manager can deactivate and reactivate an announcement
Announcement Lifecycle › manager can update announcement title and content
Announcement Lifecycle › deleted announcement no longer appears in public list
Announcement Lifecycle › manager can list their own managed announcements
Announcement Lifecycle › regular user is forbidden from creating an announcement
Manager Dashboard › dashboard is inaccessible without session
Manager Dashboard › dashboard summary returns expected numeric fields
Manager Dashboard › dashboard summary accepts date range filter

property.name: fixme
property.value: Known backend bug: LINQ cannot translate date-range filter on projection record

testcase.name: Manager Dashboard › dashboard sales returns aggregate and daily breakdown
Manager Dashboard › dashboard points returns issued and redeemed data
Manager Dashboard › dashboard coupons returns coupon metrics
Manager Dashboard › dashboard activity returns offers, announcements and recent transactions
Manager Dashboard › all dashboard sections respond 200 with a 7-day range

property.name: fixme
property.value: Known backend bug: LINQ date-range filter fails on projection records (DashboardService)

testcase.name: Chatbot — FAQ Assistant › chatbot endpoint is reachable without a session
Chatbot — FAQ Assistant › chatbot returns a structured response (not a crash)
Chatbot — FAQ Assistant › chatbot responds with answer when configured

property.name: skip
property.value: Chatbot not configured (AI_API_KEY missing) — skipping on local

testcase.name: Chatbot — FAQ Assistant › chatbot accepts "msg" field as alternative

property.name: skip
property.value: Chatbot not configured — skipping on local

testcase.name: Chatbot — FAQ Assistant › chatbot accepts "question" field as alternative

property.name: skip
property.value: Chatbot not configured — skipping on local

testcase.name: Chatbot — FAQ Assistant › chatbot response includes responseTimeMs

property.name: skip
property.value: Chatbot not configured — skipping on local

testcase.name: Chatbot — FAQ Assistant › multiple questions in same conversation session are accepted

property.name: skip
property.value: Chatbot not configured — skipping on local

testcase.name: Chatbot — FAQ Assistant › chatbot history endpoint returns 200
Store Management › manager can create a new store
Store Management › created store appears in the managed stores list
Store Management › created store is visible to regular users in store listing
Store Management › manager can update store name and description
Store Management › manager managed stores list is accessible
Store Management › regular user session is forbidden from creating a store
Store Management › creating a store without session returns 4xx
